allow: Bash(node -e "const initSqlJs = require\('sql.js'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); \(async \(\) => { const SQL = await initSqlJs\(\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('packages/server/photo-quest.db'\); const db = new SQL.Database\(buf\); const media = db.exec\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM media'\); console.log\('Media count:', media[0]?.values[0][0] || 0\); const jobs = db.exec\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM jobs'\); console.log\('Jobs count:', jobs[0]?.values[0][0] || 0\); }\)\(\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import initSqlJs from 'sql.js'; import fs from 'fs'; const SQL = await initSqlJs\(\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('packages/server/photo-quest.db'\); const db = new SQL.Database\(buf\); console.log\('Media:', db.exec\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM media'\)[0]?.values[0][0]\); console.log\('Jobs:', db.exec\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs'\)[0]?.values[0][0]\); const sample = db.exec\('SELECT id, title, status FROM media LIMIT 5'\); if \(sample.length\) { console.log\('Sample:', JSON.stringify\(sample[0].values\)\); }")
